bead.title: runs: merge Sessions/Executions detail into layer-aware Runs row expansion
bead.description: Promote run-detail subcomponents into cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/. Layer-aware row expansion in Runs table — layer=run shows AgentSession-style detail; layer=try shows execution-bundle detail. Sessions and Executions tabs retire (replaced by layer chips on Runs).
bead.acceptance: 1. lib/runDetail/ contains promoted subcomponents (overview, prompt, response, tools, session). 2. Runs page row-expansion uses these. 3. Sessions and Executions routes redirect (302 with sunset header per codex).
